---
title: "About me"
image: img/cuong.png
page-layout: full
about:
  id: about-div
  template: solana
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 10em
  links:
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com.au/citations?user=eAkq43kAAAAJ
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/cnguyen10
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/ProbabilitaML
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/cuong-c-nguyen
    - icon: envelope-at
      text: Email
      href: mailto:cuong.c.nguyen@hotmail.com
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: false
---
:::{#about-div}
:::{.text-start}
I am Cuong Nguyen (and in my native &#x1f1fb;&#x1f1f3; language: Nguy&#x1EC5;n Cao C&#x01B0;&#x1EDD;ng).

I am currently holding a lecturer position at the Centre for Vision, Speech and Signal Processing, University of Surrey, UK.

I am interested in machine learning research, especially probabilistic graphical model, Bayesian inference and statistical learning.

:::
:::

## Career

<ul class="timeline-with-icons">
    <li class="timeline-item mb-5">
        <span class="timeline-icon">
            <i class="bi bi-easel text-primary fa-sm fa-fw"></i>
        </span>
        <h5 class="fw-bold">Lecturer in People-Centred AI</h5>
        <p class="text-muted mb-2">
            <i class="bi bi-pin-map">&nbsp;</i>
            University of Surrey, UK &#x1F1EC;&#x1F1E7;
        </p>
        <p class="text-muted mb-2">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar">&nbsp;</i>
            1 August 2025 - present
        </p>
        <p class="text-muted">
            Research in human-centric AI
        </p>
    </li>
    <li class="timeline-item mb-5">
        <span class="timeline-icon">
            <i class="bi bi-search text-primary fa-sm fa-fw"></i>
        </span>
        <h5 class="fw-bold">Post-doctoral Researcher</h5>
        <p class="text-muted mb-2">
            <i class="bi bi-pin-map">&nbsp;</i>
            University of Surrey, UK &#x1F1EC;&#x1F1E7;
        </p>
        <p class="text-muted mb-2">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar">&nbsp;</i>
            7 March 2024 - 31 July 2025
        </p>
        <p class="text-muted">
            Research in human-machine cooperation, especially learning to defer
        </p>
    </li>
</ul>
<ul class="timeline-with-icons">
    <li class="timeline-item mb-5">
        <span class="timeline-icon">
            <i class="bi bi-search text-primary fa-sm fa-fw"></i>
        </span>
        <h5 class="fw-bold">Research Associate</h5>
        <p class="text-muted mb-2">
            <i class="bi bi-pin-map">&nbsp;</i>
            The University of Adelaide, Australia &#x1F1E6;&#x1F1FA;
        </p>
        <p class="text-muted mb-2">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar">&nbsp;</i>
            8 April 2022 - 31 January 2024
        </p>
        <p class="text-muted">
            Research in data-centric noisy-label learning
        </p>
    </li>
</ul>
<ul class="timeline-with-icons">
    <li class="timeline-item mb-5">
        <span class="timeline-icon">
            <i class="bi bi-wrench text-primary fa-sm fa-fw"></i>
        </span>
        <h5 class="fw-bold">Process and Equipment Engineer</h5>
        <p class="text-muted mb-2">
            <i class="bi bi-pin-map">&nbsp;</i>
            Intel Products Vietnam &#x1f1fb;&#x1f1f3;
        </p>
        <p class="text-muted mb-2">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar">&nbsp;</i>
            21 July 2012 - 16 July 2015
        </p>
        <p class="text-muted">
            Maintain the production line of the classification module
        </p>
    </li>
</ul>

## Education

<ul class="timeline-with-icons">
    <li class="timeline-item mb-5">
        <span class="timeline-icon">
            <i class="bi bi-mortarboard text-primary fa-sm fa-fw"></i>
        </span>
        <h5 class="fw-bold">Doctor of Philosophy</h5>
        <p class="text-muted mb-2">
            <i class="bi bi-pin-map">&nbsp;</i>
            The University of Adelaide, Australia &#x1F1E6;&#x1F1FA;
        </p>
        <p class="text-muted mb-2">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar">&nbsp;</i>
            16 April 2018 - 9 March 2022
        </p>
        <p class="text-muted">
            Research in few-shot meta-learning under the supervision of Prof. Gustavo Carneiro and Dr Thanh-Toan Do
        </p>
    </li>
    <li class="timeline-item mb-5">
        <span class="timeline-icon">
            <i class="bi bi-mortarboard text-primary fa-sm fa-fw"></i>
        </span>
        <h5 class="fw-bold">MPhil. in Electronic Engineering</h5>
        <p class="text-muted mb-2">
            <i class="bi bi-pin-map">&nbsp;</i>
            The University of Adelaide, Australia &#x1F1E6;&#x1F1FA;
        </p>
        <p class="text-muted mb-2">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar">&nbsp;</i>
            2 August 2015 - 8 January 2018
        </p>
        <p class="text-muted">
            Research in micro-scaled vibration energy harvesting under the supervision of Prof. Said Al-Sarawi and Prof. Damith Ranasinghe
        </p>
    </li>
</ul>
<ul class="timeline-with-icons">
    <li class="timeline-item mb-5">
        <span class="timeline-icon">
            <i class="bi bi-mortarboard text-primary fa-sm fa-fw"></i>
        </span>
        <h5 class="fw-bold">BS. in Mechanical Engineering</h5>
        <p class="text-muted mb-2">
            <i class="bi bi-pin-map">&nbsp;</i>
            Portland State University, US &#x1F1FA;&#x1F1F8;
        </p>
        <p class="text-muted mb-2">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar">&nbsp;</i>
            12 July 2010 - 17 June 2012
        </p>
        <p class="text-muted">
            Awarded the Magna cum laude
        </p>
    </li>
</ul>
